rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions; Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiff Edith Mazzaferris Requests For Production Of Documents (Set Two) And Requests For Admissions And Genuineness Of Documents; Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiff Edith Mazzaferri's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Requests for Admission from Defendant Ronald Mazzaferro as to Nos. 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 38, 39, 41, 42, 48, 49, 55, 56, 57, 63, 64, 65, 66, 70, 71, 72, 73, 73, 74, 75, 76 and 77 is granted. Plaintiff Edith Mazzaferri's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Requests for Production of Documents from Defendant Ronald Mazzaferro as to Nos. 1 through 41 is granted. All further responses due 10 days from 12/4/13. The request for sanctions in the amount of $3,200 is granted, balance denied. Ronald Mazzaferro shall pay said amount within ten days of 12/4/13. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who contests the tentative and requests argument must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on 12/3/13.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions Of Great Sunset Ventures, Inc. And For Sanctions; Motion To Compel Great Sunset Ventures, Inc. To Respond To Plaintiffs Requests For Admissions And Genuineness Of Documents; Motion For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiff Edith Mazaferri's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Requests for Admission from Defendant Great Sunset Ventures as to Nos. 2, 3, 4, 5, 10, and 11 is granted. Further responses due within 10 days from 12/4/13. Prevailing party to prepare order. Any party who contests the tentative and requests argument must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel no later than 5:00 p.m. on December 3, 2013.

rulings.Case Title: REGARDING THE KAUPKE FAMILY TRUST, LEE AND CHARLEEN KAUPKE, SETTLORS, DECEASED
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment On Petition For An Order That Trustee Satisfy Judgment From Amounts Which Beneficiary Kurt C. Kaupke Is Entitled; And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Karen J. Casey's Motion for Summary Judgment is Granted. No opposition. Karen J. Casey's Request for Judicial Notice is granted. No opposition. Prevailing party to prepare the order which shall reflect that the court grants the request for judicial notice and further, each allegation set forth in the separate statement is supported by the judically noticed documents, and accordingly, the court finds that Kurt C. Kaupke is a beneficiary of the Kaupke Family Trust, that the Kaupke Family Trust contains no spendthrift provisions or restraints on transfer, that Karen J. Casey holds a judgment against Kurt C. Kaupke in the amount of $527,686.50 which shall be satisfied out of any trust distribution due to Kurt C. Kaupke. The order to be prepared shall reflect that Trustee Karen Kaupke shall pay to Karen J. Casey any distributions due to Kurt C. Kaupke up to the amount of $527,686.50. Any party who contests the tentative and wishes to argue the matter must notify the court (415-551-3702) and opposing counsel/party by 5:00 p.m. on 12/3/13.
